title: [Tmodloader] 正弦运动的实现
content: Ver 1.4.4.9 高级运动的编写过程就像描点画出函数的图像。需要先在屏幕上描出一系列点，随后让速度向量全部指向这些点。 以下为完整代码 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859606162636465666768using Microsoft.Xna.Framework;using System;using Terraria;using Terraria.DataStructures;using Terraria.ID;using Terraria.ModLoader;namespace poo.Content.Projectiles{ public class DustProj2 : ModProjectile { Player player => Main.player[Projectile.owner]; Vector2 ord = Vector2.Zero; float timer = 0; float startVel; public override void SetDefaults() { Projectile.width = Projectile.height = 32; Projectile.damage = 3000; Projectile.friendly = true; Projectile.extraUpdates = 25; Projectile.penetrate = -1; Projectile.tileCollide = false; Projectile.timeLeft = 360; } public override void AI() { //Projectile.velocity.Y += 0.01f; if (ord == Vector2.Zero) { startVel = Projectile.velocity.ToRotation(); Projectile.velocity *= 0; ord = Projectile.Center; } else { timer++; float height = 50f; float t = 60f; float speedX = 2f; float w = MathHelper.Pi * 2 / t; Vector2 vel = new Vector2(timer * speedX, height * (float)Math.Cos(timer * MathHelper.Pi / 180)); vel = vel.RotatedBy(startVel); Vector2 position = ord + vel; Projectile.velocity = position - Projectile.Center; } for (int i = 0; i < 1; i++) { Dust dust1 = Dust.NewDustDirect(Projectile.Center, 6, 6, 269, 0, 0, 0, default, 0.5f); dust1.noGravity = true; dust1.velocity.Y = dust1.velocity.X = 0; dust1.scale = 1f; //dust1.velocity *= 0.1f; } } }} 要做到正弦曲线的运动形式，首先可以将一段曲线运动化为数段直线运动。如上图，$\vec{AB}$以及$\vec{BC}$等表示每一帧弹幕的运动向量Projectile.Velocity。现在的问题就是通过数学变换把它们表示出来。 左上角表示泰拉直角坐标系原点，这些红色向量可以分别表示为$\vec{i} - \vec{u}$, $\vec{j} - \vec{i}$。我们初始记录了一个ord向量为Projectile.Center。

title: [Tmodloader] 简单绘制（帧图及残影）
content: Ver 1.4.4.9  Microsoft.Xna.Framework;using Microsoft.Xna.Framework.Graphics;using System;using System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates;using Terraria;using Terraria.DataStructures;using Terraria.GameContent;using Terraria.GameContent.ItemDropRules;using Terraria.ID;using Terraria.ModLoader;namespace poo.Content.Projectiles{ public class Anima : ModProjectile { //设置弹幕主人为player Player player => Main.player[Projectile.owner]; public override void SetStaticDefaults() { //帧图的总帧数 Main.projFrames[Type] = 3; //模式2可记录运动轨迹和方向 ProjectileID.Sets.TrailingMode[Type] = 2; //一共记录几次 ProjectileID.Sets.TrailCacheLength[Type] = 4; } public override void SetDefaults() { //基础属性 Projectile.width = 71; Projectile.height = 170; Projectile.friendly = true; Projectile.tileCollide = false; Projectile.timeLeft = 300; //aiStyle = -1表示不使用原版ai Projectile.aiStyle = -1; Projectile.DamageType = DamageClass.Melee; Projectile.penetrate = -1; Projectile.ignoreWater = true; } public override void AI() { //基础的粒子效果 for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) { Dust dust1 = Dust.NewDustDirect(Projectile.Center - Projectile.Size / 2, 60, 150, 90, 0, 0); dust1.noGravity = true; } Projectile.ai[0]++; if (Projectile.ai[0] == 1) { //设置基础速度，表示在单位向量的基础上*150 Projectile.velocity = Projectile.velocity.SafeNormalize(Vector2.Zero) * 150f; } //不断减速 Projectile.velocity *= 0.85f; //Projectile.velocity = Projectile.velocity.RotatedBy(0.03f); //让弹幕旋转方向与速度方向一致 Projectile.rotation = Projectile.velocity.ToRotation(); //如果弹幕朝向左边射出（即向量为负），那就翻转一次 if (Projectile.velocity.X < 0) { Projectile.direction = Projectile.spriteDirection = -1; Projectile.rotation += MathHelper.ToRadians(180); } else { //Projectile.direction = Projectile.spriteDirection = 1;//速度向左时为1，也就是不变 //Projectile.rotation = Projectile.velocity.ToRotation() + 3.1416f;//由于水平反转了我们需要加半圈 } //原版自带的帧图计时器 Projectile.frameCounter++; //让Projectile.frame在0到x不停变化 //数字5对应的数越小则变化次数越多 Projectile.frame = (Projectile.frameCounter / 5) % Main.projFrames[Type]; //if (Math.Abs(Projectile.velocity.X) < 0.5f && Math.Abs(Projectile.velocity.Y) < 0.5f) //{ // Projectile.Kill(); //} } //开始绘制 public override bool PreDraw(ref Color lightColor) { //声明材质 Texture2D texture = TextureAssets.Projectile[Type].Value; //rectangle表示一个矩形框，这里新定义了一个 //new Rectangle()共四个参数，分别表示为 //框左上角的水平坐标 //框左上角的纵向坐标 //框的宽度 //框的长度 Rectangle rectangle = new Rectangle( 0, texture.Height / Main.projFrames[Type] * Projectile.frame, texture.Width, texture.Height / Main.projFrames[Type] ); if (Projectile.ai[1] < 3) { Projectile.ai[1]++; } //拖尾绘制 for (int i = 0; i < ProjectileID.Sets.TrailCacheLength[Type]; i++) { //定义一个从1递减为0的插值 float factor = 1 - (float)i / ProjectileID.Sets.TrailCacheLength[Type]; //oldPos[]数组记录了之前的1位置，但需要长和宽分别要加上弹幕大小的1/2，否则残影会绘制在弹幕的左上角而非中心 //-Main.screenPosition是为了将世界坐标1转化为屏幕坐标 Vector2 oldcenter = Projectile.oldPos[i] + Projectile.Size / 2 - Main.screenPosition; //主要绘制内容 //共七个参数，分别为 //材质 //绘制的位置，解释见上 //帧图选框 //颜色 //贴图旋转方向 //旋转中心的坐标，这里写为单帧贴图的中心，因此旋转也能围绕中心 //贴图的缩放比例 //图片翻转效果 Main.EntitySpriteDraw( texture, oldcenter, rectangle, Color.DarkRed * factor, Projectile.oldRot[i], new Vector2(texture.Width / 2, texture.Height / 2 / Main.projFrames[Type]), new Vector2(1.5f * factor, 1.5f * factor), Projectile.direction == 1 ? SpriteEffects.None : SpriteEffects.FlipHorizontally, 0); } //Main.DiscoColor Main.EntitySpriteDraw(texture, Projectile.Center - Main.screenPosition, rectangle, Color.DarkRed, Projectile.rotation, new Vector2(texture.Width / 2, texture.Height / 2 / Main.projFrames[Type]), new Vector2(1.5f， 1.5f), Projectile.direction == 1 ? SpriteEffects.None : SpriteEffects.FlipHorizontally, 0 ); //阻止自动绘制；return true会启动自带的绘制 return false; } }} 以上为整份Proj.cs的代码。

title: C打印三角形
content: 输入一个正整数n，输出一个三角形.以n=4为例，其输出为： * *** *** * 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132#include <stdio.h>int main() {	int n, i, j, k;	scanf("%d", &n);	//上三角 for (i = 1; i <= n; i++) { for (j = 1; j <= 2 * n - 2 * i; j++) { printf(" "); } for (k = 1; k <= 2 * i - 1; k++) { printf("*"); } printf(" ");	} //下三角	for (i = 1; i <= n-1; i++) { for (j = 1; j <= 2 * i; j++) { printf(" "); } for (k = 1; k <= 2 * n - 2 * i - 1; k++) { printf("*"); } printf(" ");	} return 0;}

title: [C]斐波那契数列
content: 输入一个数n，为斐波那契数列（1，1，2，3，5，8······）第n项，打印其值. 循环法1234567891011121314151617181920#include <stdio.h>int main() {	int n, i, temp, f1 = 1, f2 = 1;	scanf("%d", &n);	if (n == 1 || n == 2) { printf("1");	} else { for (i = 2; i < n; i++) { temp = f1 + f2; f1 = f2; f2 = temp; } printf("%d", f2);	} return 0;}

title: [C]基础算法题
content: 班组平均工资 一个单位下设3个班组，每个班组人数不固定，需要统计每个班组的平均工资。分别输入3个班组所有职工的工资，当输入-1时表示该班组的输入结束。输出班组号（从1开始）和该班组的平均工资。 输入： 1567.873421.8-12234.652346.9-13563.75411.76-1 输出： 1 2494.832 2290.773 4487.73
